task_description: Add 13 major features to MK OS: bulk knowledge ingestion (7k+ facts), learn from corrections, math/science solver, scheduled tasks with proactive Telegram, personal assistant (calendar/todos/notes), file reading, voice I/O framework, code execution sandbox, image understanding, multi-language Arabic support, plugin API, security hardening (AES-256, auth, rate limiting, sanitization), and comprehensive testing (30+ tests, 200+ assertions).
